title: Pentameris tysonii
taxonomy: Pentameris tysonii is a species within the genus Pentameris. The genus Pentameris is a part of the large family Poaceae, commonly referred to as grasses. Poaceae is one of the largest and most widespread families of flowering plants. It contains over 12,000 species and is found in almost all parts of the world. The classification of Pentameris tysonii places it within the kingdom Plantae.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure.
